About Me

I am graduate student at Penn Graduate School of Education. I have always been interested in the intersection of language learning, civic engagement, critical studies, and digital humanities. I have been engaged in grassroots community-based programs related to education, immigration & citizenship, and has also been in an ed-tech start-up industry.
